name: prompt closed-loop step registry-to-eval flows a registered prompt into the eval-dataset run
command: mkdir -p prompts/x evals/datasets/agents && printf 'name: x\n' > prompts/x/v1.0.0.md && printf '{"input":"q","expected":"a"}\n' > evals/datasets/agents/x.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/closed-loop-test.sh" --step registry-to-eval --prompt prompts/x/v1.0.0.md --dataset evals/datasets/agents/x.jsonl --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'prompt=x flowed_into=eval' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
